zh.lifeSummary: 當Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr於1611年2月3日在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安受洗時，他的父親Francis Bushnell Of Horsham31歲，母親Ferris Quenell23歲。他於大約1643年與Rebecca Chapman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1652年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特被列為saddler。他去世於1683年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可享年72歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州米德萊可笛卡爾 賽布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr于1611年2月3日在英国英格兰素可霍沙安受洗时，他的父亲Francis Bushnell Of Horsham31岁，母亲Ferris Quenell23岁。他于大约1643年与Rebecca Chapman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1652年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特被列为saddler。他去世于1683年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可享年72岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州米德萊可笛卡爾 賽布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Bushnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushnells Green in Bucklebury (Berkshire), early recorded as Bushenell or Busshendhill.
History: Francis Bushnell came to New Haven, CT, in 1639, and was a founder of Guilford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.
In 1644, Saybrook Colony merged with Connecticut Colony. It could be said that it became part of Connecticut. In 1666, Saybrook became part of the newly organized New London County.

en.lifeSummary: When Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr was christened on 3 February 1611, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Francis Bushnell Of Horsham, was 31 and his mother, Ferris Quenell, was 23. He married Rebecca Chapman about 1643, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. In 1652, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as saddler in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 12 November 1683, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr a été baptisé le 3 février 1611, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Francis Bushnell Of Horsham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ferris Quenell, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Chapman environ 1643, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. En 1652, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est saddler à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1683, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr am 3. Februar 1611 in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war sein Vater Francis Bushnell Of Horsham 31 und seine Mutter Ferris Quenell 23. Er hat um 1643 in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Rebecca Chapman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1652, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als saddler in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. November 1683 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr è stato battezzato il 3 febbraio 1611 nel Horsham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Francis Bushnell Of Horsham, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Ferris Quenell, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Chapman circa 1643, nel Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1652, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come saddler nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 12 novembre 1683, nel Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Bushnell Srが1611年2月3日にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムで洗礼を受けた時，父Francis Bushnell Of Horshamは31歳，母Ferris Quenellは23歳であった。約1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークでRebecca Chapmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1652年，41歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードでの職業はsaddlerと記録されている。彼は1683年11月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークで72歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ミッドレセックスオルド サイブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr(이)가 1611년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Bushnell Of Horsham(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Ferris Quenell(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 Rebecca Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1652년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 saddler이었다. 그는 1683년 11월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 미들레세스 드 지브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr foi batizado em 3 de fevereiro de 1611, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Francis Bushnell Of Horsham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ferris Quenell, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Chapman aproximadamente 1643, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1652, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como saddler em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1683, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr был крещен 3 февраля 1611 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Francis Bushnell Of Horsham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ferris Quenell, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Chapman около 1643 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1652 году, в возрасте 41 год,  он работал по профессии saddler в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 12 ноября 1683 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности олд сеибрук, миддлесекс, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr se bautizó el 3 de febrero de 1611, en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Francis Bushnell Of Horsham, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ferris Quenell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Rebecca Chapman aproximadamente 1643, en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1652, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era saddler en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1683, en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
